summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the redesigned IncidentReportPage. All 14 features from the test requirements verified successfully. The redesign includes red ring + green checkmark on incident type selection, red border on focused textareas, dark navy info box without left border, gray camera icon, green circular toggle icons, and iOS-style success modal with blue OK button.
passed_tests: Step 1: Fall card shows RED RING border when selected (ring-2 ring-[#ff375f])
Step 1: Fall card shows GREEN CHECKMARK on right when selected (bg-[#30d158])
Step 1: Fall icon turns red with dark red background when selected (bg-[#5c1a2a])
Step 2: Textareas show RED/PINK BORDER when focused (ring-2 ring-[#ff375f])
Step 2: Textareas maintain RED/PINK BORDER when content is present
Step 2: High severity shows orange color when selected (bg-[#9a4f00] text-[#ff9f0a] ring-[#ff9f0a])
Step 3: Info box has dark navy background (bg-[#1c2836])
Step 3: Info box has NO left border (rounded corners only)
Step 3: Info box has gray circular info icon (bg-[#48484a] with 'i')
Step 4: Photo upload area has gray dashed border (border-[#48484a])
Step 5: Toggle icons are green circles when active (bg-[#30d158])
Step 5: Toggle checkmarks on right side are green circles
Success modal has iOS-style centered text layout
Success modal has blue OK button (text-[#0a84ff])
Success modal has border separator above OK button
Progress bar segments are thicker (h-[5px]) with 5 segments
Complete 5-step flow works from start to submission

test_credentials.registration: Create new account via 'Start Free Trial' > 'I'm a Caregiver'

seed_data_creation: None - incidents stored in component state (MOCKED API)

mocked_apis_list: Incidents stored in component state via useState
Data passed via onAddIncident callback prop
No backend API calls for incident storage

context_for_next_testing_agent: IncidentReportPage redesign fully tested. All mobile-matching styling verified: red ring + green checkmark on type selection, red border on focused textareas, dark navy info box without left border (#1c2836), gray camera icon, green circular toggle icons (#30d158), iOS-style success modal with blue OK button (#0a84ff). Key data-testids: new-incident-btn, incident-type-{fall|medication|behavioral|injury|vital|other}, severity-{low|medium|high|critical}, incident-description, incident-actions, incident-witnesses, no-witnesses-checkbox, photo-upload, notify-family-toggle, followup-toggle, incident-continue-btn, incident-back-btn, incident-submit-btn, incident-ok-btn, incident-cancel-btn.
